base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should reduce or eliminate weak call-wall acceptance attempts, targeting lower worst MAE and shorter hidden recovery exposure while preserving the core pullback, squeeze, charm-pin, charm-wall, and 1DTE edges. Main tradeoff is that the call-wall sample is only two trades, so the stricter flow box may remove the $546 convex winner; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_044/run_050 or if score improvement is only MAE-through-deletion.
label: promote
rationale: Run one batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long experiment focused on option-flow persistence, not TP compression. The score leader has excellent net profit but the global worst MAE is concentrated in call_wall_acceptance_long: 2 trades, $640.5 PnL, $290/hour, but -655.2 worst MAE and a 120-minute recovery path. Prior call-wall TP containment was basically flat and did not improve MAE, so the next distinct mechanism is stricter pre-entry acceptance quality using legal call-wall/option-flow keys only.
